notes: Galaxy map markers + Fleet Battle Groups. The Galaxy tab now shows pills for fleet missions, stationed convoys, and pirate mandates at the planets they're running at. And in a raid you can now ✦ Deploy Battle Fleet — your whole idle warship fleet at once (not the usual 2-ally cap) fights as a pooled formation with an escort-style posture (screen/balanced/press): its firepower adds to your strikes and it screens you from incoming fire, but it takes real damage each round and a ship can be lost in a hard fight. Recall it any time; survivors keep their wear and can be repaired at a shipyard. Your navy finally fights together as a fleet, not one ship at a time.
